import io
import string

let data = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(data)
mut i = 0
mut start = 0
mut idx = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(data, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 10
    let line = string.substring(data, start, i)
    println("[#{idx}] #{line}")
    idx = idx + 1
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start < n
  let line = string.substring(data, start, n)
  println("[#{idx}] #{line}")
end
